## Safety Impact

- [ ] No exploitation, payload delivery, or post-exploitation behavior added.

- [ ] HITL approval remains enforced for exploitation and post-exploitation.
- [ ] Sandbox boundaries and immutable audit logging remain intact.
- [ ] Tools continue to return JSON strings only.
- [ ] No secrets, PII, real target data, or private engagement artifacts included.
